description: Plain road-worn clothing reinforced for long travel. Balanced, cheap, and reliable.
name: Traveler's Garb

description: A flexible leather vest favored by hunters and caravan scouts. Light enough for quick movement.
name: Scout Vest

description: Old but sturdy armor patched together from salvaged plates. Heavy, practical, and protective.
name: Rustplate Mail

description: A simple woven robe lined with faint aether-thread. Offers little physical protection but strong magical warding.
name: Apprentice Robe

description: A plain copper ring said to steady the wearer's body under stress.
name: Copper Ring

description: A small charm stitched with protective thread. Common among novice mages and priests.
name: Cloth Talisman

description: A faded travel tunic with rough stitching and patched seams. It offers only modest protection, but it has clearly survived more than one hard road.
name: Worn Tunic

description: A thin apprentice's robe whose protective stitching has nearly lost its glow. Better suited for channeling magic than stopping claws or blades.
name: Faded Robe

description: Sturdy travel clothes patched for battle. Balanced physical and magic defense.
name: Reinforced Traveler's Garb

description: A light vest lined with small metal plates. Raises agility and evasion.
name: Brigandine Vest

description: Linked iron armor worn beneath a tunic. Offers strong physical defense.
name: Chain Hauberk

description: A robe sewn with quiet warding thread. Raises magic defense and maximum MP.
name: Channeler's Robe

description: A broad patrol shield made for holding the line. Improves guarding.
name: Watchmen's Shield

description: A wooden shield reinforced with iron bands. Offers reliable physical defense.
name: Ironbound Shield

description: A worn cloth bandana used by road-walkers.
name: Traveler's Bandana

description: A soft hood designed to keep vision clear. Improves accuracy and evasion.
name: Scout Hood

description: A simple iron helmet with a padded lining. Helps resist stunning blows.
name: Iron Helm

description: A plain cowl favored by young spellcasters. Raises magic defense.
name: Linen Cowl

description: A sturdy iron bracelet worn for protection. Raises maximum HP.
name: Iron Bangle

description: A green brooch filled with bitter herbs. Reduces the chance of Poison.
name: Antivenom Brooch

description: A polished lens charm worn near the collar. Reduces the chance of Blind.
name: Clear Lens

description: A small charm shaped like a hunting hawk. Improves accuracy and critical chance.
name: Hawk Charm

description: A thin ring etched with calming script. Raises MP and helps resist Silence.
name: Focus Ring

description: A fresh green charm that pulses faintly. Slowly restores HP in battle.
name: Greenleaf Charm

description: A small talisman marked with protective script. Improves magical protection.
name: Warding Talisman

description: A city guard badge issued to trusted defenders. Improves guarding.
name: Guard Badge
